title: YunSCM 2PCS 26" Heavy Duty Bike Inner Tubes 26x1.75 26x1.95 26x2.10 26x2.125 26x2.25 45/57-559 Bicycle Tubes TR4A-40mm Valve Compatible with 26x1.75/1.95/2.0/2.10/2.125/2.25 Road MTB Bike Inner Tubes
features: Compatible Size: 26x1.75/1.95/2.25 inch TR4A-40L bicycle heavy duty inner tube, enhanced the ductility of the heavy load tyre, so that these inner tubes are ideal for a wide range of applications, compatible with 26x1.75 26x1.90 26x1.95 26x2.0 26x2.10 26x2.125 26x2.0 26x2.25 47-559 50-559 54-559 57-559 mountain bikes, road bikes, Cruiser bikes, and e-bikes; and the increased thickness meets the demand for longer mileage and heavier loads of today's popular e-bikes

High Quality & Durable Tube: The bike tyre tube made of high quality butyl rubber composite material, high performance hose has higher puncture resistance than traditional hoses. The thicker tyre body can withstand more friction and abrasion, which extends the life of the hose and reduces replacement frequency and maintenance costs. And it can be used for a long time

More Air Tightness: Adopting high elasticity and high quality butyl rubber and EPDM rubber, the thickness is increased by 40%, the air tightness of the inner tube is increased by 200% compared with the ordinary butyl inner tube; the tire can continuously maintain a stable inflation air pressure state after inflation, which dramatically reduces the frequency of inflation, and the good air tightness helps to keep the pressure of the tire stable, which improves the driving safety and efficiency

Excellent Shock Absorption Ability: The heavy, strong, highly durable butyl rubber made from these inner tubes is a perfect shock absorber to reduce vibration and eliminate the shock caused by bumps and rough surfaces on the road or pavement. Heavy Duty butyl rubber for maximum ride comfort - upgrade your ride experience
Package Contains: 2-PCS heavy duty bike tubes 26x1.75/2.25 inch TR4A-40L. Easy to install and remove, and check the valve position to ensure that it is installed in the correct direction
